A:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1/2,1/2,0)  R:(0,1/2,-1/2)  RA:(1/2,0,1/2)  X:(0,1/2,0)  XA:(1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
E:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  GM:(0,0,0)  A:(1/2,0,1/2)  D:(0,1/2,1/2)  C:(1/2,1/2,0)  B:(0,0,1/2)  Y:(1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,1/2,0)
(A)E1-E1+  (A)E2-E2+  (A)E4E5  (A)E3E6  GM1+  GM1-  GM2+GM2+  GM2-GM2-  GM3GM4  GM5GM6  (M)A1+  (M)A1-  (M)A2+A2+  (M)A2-A2-  (M)A3A4  (M)A5A6  (R)D1+  (R)D1-  (R)D2+  (R)D2-  (R)D4  (R)D5  (R)D3  (R)D6  (RA)C1-  (RA)C1+  (RA)C2-  (RA)C2+  (RA)C4  (RA)C5  (RA)C3  (RA)C6  (X)B1+  (X)B1-  (X)B2+  (X)B2-  (X)B3  (X)B4  (X)B5  (X)B6  (XA)Y1+  (XA)Y1-  (XA)Y2+  (XA)Y2-  (XA)Y3  (XA)Y4  (XA)Y5  (XA)Y6  Z1-Z1+  Z2-Z2+  Z4Z5  Z3Z6
